# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-authz
spec:
  # Allow all services to communicate with each other by default
  allowAll: true
  # Define port-based authorization rules
  ports:
    - name: http
      protocol: TCP
      ports: [80, 443]
    - name: grpc
      protocol: TCP
      ports: [50051]
  # Define service account-based authorization rules
  serviceAccounts:
    - name: microservice-a
      namespace: default
    - name: microservice-b
      namespace: default
